401.description: Unauthorized access, indicating that the request has not been applied because it lacks valid authentication credentials for the target resource.

error.description: A message detailing the reason for the unauthorized status.
error.example: Unauthorized: API key is missing or invalid.

429.description: Rate limit exceeded, indicating that the request was not accepted because the application has exceeded the rate limit for the API.

error.description: A message detailing the reason for exceeding the rate limit.
error.example: Rate limit exceeded. Try again in X minutes.

rateLimitExceededExample.summary: Example response for rate limit exceeded

value.error: Rate limit exceeded. Try again in 1 minute.

500.description: Internal Server Error, indicating that the server encountered an unexpected condition that prevented it from fulfilling the request.

error.description: A message detailing the unexpected condition encountered by the server.
error.example: Internal server error. Please try again later.

internalServerErrorExample.summary: Example response for an internal server error

value.error: Internal server error. Please try again later.
